fix(whatsapp): finish timeout-aware setup and status handling

fix(whatsapp): reuse active QR and preserve runtime warnings

feat(workspace): add safe workspace reset command
[Security] zizmor template-injection findings across CI workflows
add option for MCP apps support

chore(ci): harden security ownership and workflow permissions

fix(mobile): allow private LAN pairing auth
